title: Birth of Architectural Education at RTU
description: Early curriculum begins formalizing architectural drawing and measurement as core competencies.

title: First Public Student Drawing Display
description: A small public display of student works introduces academic drawing to a broader audience.

title: Introduction of Measured Survey Coursework
description: Measured survey and documentation practices become a regular part of studio training.

title: Expansion of Interior Perspective Studies
description: Interior perspective and construction detail drawing receive dedicated lecture blocks.

title: Archive Cataloging Method Adopted
description: Systematic labeling and cataloging begins, enabling later digitization and cross-referencing.

title: Historic Riga Blocks Documented by Students
description: Student fieldwork produces façade studies and measured drawings for key historic streets.

title: Technical Drafting Standards Updated
description: Curriculum updates align technical drawings with contemporary drafting standards and notation.

title: Environment Drawing Module Introduced
description: Urban, landscape, and human-in-environment studies become a structured coursework track.

title: Archive Conservation Initiative
description: Preservation efforts stabilize paper materials and improve storage and handling procedures.

title: Diagrammatic Research Drawings Added
description: Research drawings and typology diagrams become part of studio deliverables.

title: First Digital Scanning Pilot
description: A pilot scanning workflow tests digitization quality, naming conventions, and metadata needs.

title: Archive Website Concept Approved
description: A concept for a searchable digital archive is approved to support teaching and research.

title: Public Exhibition Series Launch
description: Regular exhibitions highlight student drawing heritage and connect to contemporary studio practice.

title: Expanded Metadata Schema Drafted
description: Metadata fields are expanded to support filtering by theme, task category, and teacher/student links.

title: Digitization Milestone: 10k Items Prepared
description: A major preparation milestone standardizes image handling and improves catalog consistency.
